metadata.description: Structured agent orchestration for Claude Code — multi-agent workflows, named reviewer personas, session continuity, and deep research pipelines.

plugins.name: coordinator
plugins.description: Core orchestration: PM-EM dynamic, workflow skills, reviewer personas (Patrik, Zolí), session lifecycle, research pipelines, three-tier delegation.

plugins.name: web-dev
plugins.description: Web development reviewers: Palí (frontend, design tokens, CSS) and Fru (UX flows, trust signals).

plugins.name: game-dev
plugins.description: Game development reviewer: Sid (Unreal Engine, Blueprint/C++, gameplay mechanics). Includes Blueprint inspector agents.

plugins.name: data-science
plugins.description: Data science reviewer: Camelia (ML pipelines, statistics, data modeling, LLM workflows).

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Google NotebookLM integration via MCP. Research YouTube videos, podcasts, and audio content.

plugins.name: remember
plugins.description: Automatic session memory — captures what Claude worked on, summarizes via Haiku, injects history at session start. Pure Node.js, cross-platform.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Multi-agent deep research pipelines — internet research with Agent Teams (Pipeline A), repo assessment (Pipeline B). Haiku scout builds shared source corpus, Sonnet specialists verify and cross-pollinate, Opus synthesizes findings.

plugins.name: holodeck-control
plugins.description: Context-efficient wrapper for holodeck-control MCP server. Routes UE editor operations through domain-specific agents with thin tool visibility.

plugins.name: holodeck-docs
plugins.description: UE documentation and Python execution — wraps holodeck-docs MCP server with Sonnet agents for context-isolated doc retrieval and editor scripting.
